response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced Staff/Senior engineer with 13+ years of experience, far exceeding the junior/mid-level scope of this role. While technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent work) align, there is significant overqualification risk: likely salary mismatch, retention concerns, and limited growth runway in an entry-level IC position. Resume shows no PostgreSQL (MongoDB instead) and no Nest.js. Berlin location fits the on-site requirement, but the seniority gap is the dominant factor.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with fullstack breadth across React-era frontends and backend services
Based in Berlin, supporting the high on-site presence requirement
Bonus alignment with nice-to-haves: AI/LLM agent infrastructure, Docker/Kubernetes, and CI/CD experience
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level role suggests likely short tenure or compensation mismatch
No PostgreSQL experience shown (MongoDB only); no Nest.js mentioned
No demonstrated interest in renewable energy / construction tech domain
